title: Length of time for a meeting in Calendar view
excerpt:
Maybe this exists already but I can’t seem to figure out how to execute. 
We have a board that collects all Calendly booked calls. Some are 15 minutes, 30, 60 120 minutes etc. But the calendar view shows them all in 30-m…

posts.author: ChrisBuna (Chris Buna - Simplified Workflows)
posts.cookedHtml:
Maybe this exists already but I can’t seem to figure out how to execute.

We have a board that collects all Calendly booked calls. Some are 15 minutes, 30, 60 120 minutes etc. But the calendar view shows them all in 30-minute slots.

posts.author: Thomas-Omnitas (Thomas Karlsson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yeah, we desperately need to be able to reflect start and stop times on the same day.
Right now we cant manage any thing that require precision on hours instead of days.
